_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin deficiency-associated transcriptional dysregulation suggests a novel therapy for tibial pseudoarthrosis in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Using fluorescent-activated flow cytometry, we detected no quantitative increase in ERK activation (phosphorylation) in pseudoarthrosis cells compared to individual-matched iliac crest cells
details: Successfully detected ERK activation levels by flow cytometry, showing no quantitative increase in ERK phosphorylation in pseudoarthrosis cells compared to individual-matched iliac crest cells
